name: Behja
description: Developer of a real estate platform intended for those who want to rent a home with the option to eventually buy it. The company's platform allows one to choose any property available for sale on the market with transparency and reliability in the contractual agreements between landlords and tenants and handles everything from managing utility bills to seamless rental payments, enabling aspiring homeowners with a more flexible and convenient path.

name: Blink
description: Developer of online ordering and delivery software designed to take online orders directly from the websites. The company's software features customer engagement tools, ordering channels, reporting dashboards, and order trends, enabling businesses to access customer data with analytics to make informed decisions and break their dependency on food delivery aggregators.

name: Ejari Co.
description: Operator of a real estate technology company intended to provide rent now and pay later service for residential properties. The company rents the unit on behalf of the customer for a period of one year or six months and then re-rents it to the customer with a monthly payment plan, enabling customers to reduce their financial burden and pay rent on a monthly basis.

name: FIFOplus
description: Developer of a procurement software designed for HORECA businesses to connect to food suppliers. The company's platform tracks inventory levels and automatically generates orders when supplies are low, provides insights of purchasing trends, enabling restaurants, caterers, cafes, home based and cloud kitchens to make informed decisions about their inventory management and save money.

name: Mile
description: Provider of logistics platform intended to revolutionize logistics from the first to the last mile that makes enterprise Tech Stack the bedrock for fleet operators. The company's seamlessly integrated logistics and commerce platform digitally orchestrates the transfiguration of intricate operations from fleet and warehouse management to fulfilment storage, merchant oversight, and marketplace commerce, thereby empowering enterprises to elevate their operations to unprecedented levels of efficiency and productivity.

name: Nqoodlet
description: Developer of a digital platform designed to help small and medium-sized enterprises manage their spending wisely. The company's platform allows enterprises to handle their expenses, and purchases, register bills directly into one consolidated platform, and have a real-time view of all the transactions through the corporate cards given to the employees, enabling small and medium-sized enterprises to simplify expense management operations.

name: Adalah for IT Systems LLC
description: Operator of a legal platform intended to offer legal search engine services. The company's platform facilitates access, understanding and dealing with Saudi legal documents with the click of a button and also provides support services to legal professionals by providing a qualitative database that includes more than sixty thousand documents and legal documents related to the Saudi system, enabling companies to find, understand and manage accurate up-to-date legal content in seconds.

name: Reachware Inc.
description: Operator of an integration platform as a service (IPaaS) designed for systems to talk seamlessly with each other and allows separate SaaS (software as a service) systems to function as a unified ecosystem. The company's platform offers to create an echo system by integrating all business applications with each other, adding more value to customers by automating the business processes, scaling up the business by eliminating all the system impediments and manual work, transforming the systems to be connected and on the cloud managed by reach ware API (Application Programming Interface) Gateway and providing deep insights, enabling clients to automate their business processes to be more efficient and agile.

name: Socialee
description: Developer of a video commerce platform designed to connect beauty content creators & consumers, through honest product reviews. The company combines an authentic product discovery experience with an e-commerce service that acts as a single destination to discover and learn about products through 60 to 90-second shoppable videos from friends, creators and brands, enabling users to get real reviews from real people, authentic beauty experts and their friends.
